nodes.label: IA Chat Screen — Active Session Context
nodes.description: IA tab showing an in-session AI chat. Header: 'Tu sesión activa'. AI message summarizes session state with bullet points (15 min restantes, 3 apps fuera de tu mente, 1 item pendiente en tu ritual, 2 recordatorios activos). Offers contextual help. Shows quick-action chip row and freeform text input.

nodes.label: IA Chat Quick-Action Chips
nodes.description: Row of contextual quick-action chip buttons displayed below the AI message in the IA chat screen. Chips: 'Organizar mi horario', 'Añadir recordatorio', 'Sugerir ritual', 'Recomendar apps'. Allow one-tap actions without typing. Teal/green accent on 'Sugerir ritual' chip.

nodes.label: IA Session Summary Message Bubble
nodes.description: AI chat bubble that proactively summarizes the current active session state: remaining time, blocked apps count, pending ritual items, active reminders. Followed by an open question 'En qué te ayudo ahora?' and quick-action chips.

nodes.label: IA Chat Freeform Text Input
nodes.description: Text input field at the bottom of the IA chat screen. Placeholder: 'Pregúntame algo o describe cómo te sientes…'. Has attachment icon (left) and send icon (right).

nodes.label: IA Chat Session-Aware Context Feature
nodes.description: When a session is active, the IA tab proactively reads session state (time remaining, blocked apps, ritual items, reminders) and surfaces it as a structured summary with quick-action chips. Enables natural language + one-tap interaction during focus sessions.
